results.title: Samsung Life Insurance Q1 Net Income Rises

results.title: ‘Poverty porn’: Moral dilemma in MrBeast’s billion‐dollar empire
results.description: Jimmy Donaldson, better known as MrBeast, has an estimated net worth of $A3.6 billion. He is also a prominent philanthropist.

results.title: Labor Day Holiday Boosts Regional Travel by 70% in Korea
results.description: Domestic travelers in Korea reached 11.63 million on May 1, up 55% year-on-year, as Labor Day was designated a legal public holiday, with non-metropolitan areas seeing 70% growth.

results.title: Jhunjhunwala-backed Bagmane Prime Office REIT lists at 3.5% premium over IPO price
results.description: Bagmane Prime Office REIT debuted on the NSE at Rs 103.50, a 3.5% premium to its IPO price, following a highly subscribed Rs 3,405 crore offering. The Bengaluru-focused REIT, backed by Blackstone, attracted significant investor interest, with its portfolio boasting high occupancy and marquee tenants like Google and Amazon.

results.title: China's Xi warns Trump that differences over Taiwan could lead to conflict
results.description: BEIJING (AP) — China's Xi Jinping warned President Donald Trump on Thursday that the two countries could clash over Taiwan if the issue was not handled properly, an unusually harsh admonition that stood in contrast to the American leader's praise for his counterpart.

results.title: El novato Carson Benge se redime con el hit decisivo en la décima y los Mets vencen 3-2 a Detroit
Pistons blast refs for controversial no-call in critical playoff defeat
results.description: The Pistons ended up losing in overtime after a potential foul call in the closing seconds of regulation was left alone by officials.

results.title: Altimmune outlines PERFORMA Phase III MASH start in 2H 2026 and cash runway to 2029 52-week readout
results.description: Altimmune (ALT) Q1 2026 earnings call: $535M cash runway, Phase III PERFORMA MASH trial launching H2 2026, plus AUD/ALD catalysts—read now.

results.title: Sensex, Nifty trade higher amid buying in pharma, banking stocks
results.description: Indian equity markets traded higher despite rising crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions, led by gains in pharma and banking stocks. Sensex and Nifty climbed over 0.6 per cent, while IT shares lagged amid rupee concerns, FPI selling pressure and global market uncertainties

results.title: Sensex jumps 300 pts, Nifty up 30 pts in early trade
results.description: Top gainers on the Nifty were Cipla (up 7.18 per cent), Adani Enterprises (up 4.21 per cent), Adani Ports (up 2.15 per cent), Trent (up 1.95 per cent), and NTPC (up 1.66 per cent).

results.title: CNG Price Hiked: MGL hikes Mumbai CNG Price by Rs 2; new rates from today to be Rs 84 per kg
results.description: Mahanagar Gas Limited (MGL) announced a Rs 2-per-kg hike in the retail price of compressed natural gas (CNG).

results.title: Bacolod distributes P9M financial aid
results.description: The Bacolod City Government distributed a total of P9-million financial assistance to five organizational beneficiaries under the Sprout program.

results.title: Unusually rainy April signals Bangladesh’s climate shift
results.description: April in Bangladesh has long been synonymous with scorching heat, prolonged dry spells and occasional nor’westers sweeping across the plains. Traditionally regarded as the country’s warmest month, it is more often associated with heatwaves than sustained rainfall. But April-May 2026 has disrupted that familiar pattern. Frequent thunderstorms, hailstorms and intense... Details

results.title: Alia Bhatt continues her unstoppable Cannes fashion streak in regal brocade gown, gorgeous heirloom-inspired diamonds
results.description: Alia Bhatt brought vintage royalty to Cannes 2026 in a floral brocade corset ensemble paired with heirloom-inspired jewellery at the L'Oréal Paris gala dinner.

results.title: 41-Pitch Inning Dooms Matthew Liberatore-Athletics Beat Cardinals 6-2
results.description: Matthew Liberatore had a really strong 4 innings, but it was a 41-pitch 5th inning that ended his night and allowed the Athletics to beat the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2. After a relatively quiet first three innings, the Cardinals were first to score in the top of the 4th inning when Nolan Gorman singled to [...]

results.title: From Elon Musk to Jensen Huang, what CEOs with Trump on China visit are eyeing
results.description: US President Donald Trump’s China visit has brought together some of America’s biggest CEOs, including Elon Musk, Tim Cook and Jensen Huang. From AI chips and Tesla approvals to Boeing aircraft deals and Wall Street ambitions, the summit may be a one-off chance to get close to Chinese leadership and bag some deals

results.title: Mental clutter
results.description: Mental clutter occurs when the mind is filled with too many thoughts, worries, tasks, and distractions at the same time.
